items.title: McConnell health update demanded by Gov. Beshear as Senate vacancy questions grow
items.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

items.title: Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5M in damages from Trump verdict
items.description: Trump was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

items.title: Delaying Social Security reform raises risks for bond markets and the economy, research finds
items.description: Social Security's trust fund that helps pay retirement benefits is projected to run out in late 2032. New research finds that may pose serious economic risks.

items.title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
items.description: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.

items.title: Trump downplays Iran's nuclear threat as ceasefire collapses
items.description: The president was asked about the ceasefire after an escalation of fighting in the Middle East.

items.title: Rivian tailspin hasn't shaken one trader's resolve
items.description: Mike Khouw revisits his Rivian trade after the stock tanks on a share offering.

items.title: Trump loses latest appeals court bid to restore his name to Kennedy Center
items.description: The appeals court said Trump had failed to provide any evidence that the Kennedy Center's fundraising would be harmed if his name is not attached.

items.title: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland as Denmark vows to defend it
items.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."

items.title: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
items.description: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.

items.title: Jim Cramer says this 'self-help story' is a long-term buy after a 25% pullback
items.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

items.title: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first outside fundraising round
items.description: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.

items.title: Waymo to start driverless rides in 4 more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
items.description: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

items.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
items.description: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

items.title: Delta launches 'basic business' fares without lounge access, seat selection
items.description: Delta is launching basic business and other stripped-down premium classes that come with fewer perks.

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.description: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.description: Speculators now see just a 44% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.

items.title: The American Dream is missing one key ingredient, says Harvard happiness expert: Without it, 'life is pretty grim'
items.description: Only 35% of U.S. adults define the American Dream as being part of a community. But one cannot thrive without the people around them, say experts.

items.title: Healthy Returns: Employers aren't expanding coverage of GLP-1 obesity drugs – many are finding ways around it
items.description: Around 36% of employers said they provide coverage of GLP-1s for both diabetes and weight loss, the same as 2025 and up from 34% in 2024, the survey said.

items.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
items.description: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

items.title: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6 AI models, ending government-requested limits
items.description: OpenAI's chief rival, Anthropic, recently restored access to its latest models following a weeks-long clash with the government.
